programme.title: Scott Losse
programme.desc: Scott Losse is a stand-up comedian from Seattle, Washington. He is married and has two chihuahuas. Scott has performed at Portland's Bridgetown Comedy Festival, SF Sketchfest, Sketchfest Seattle, Bumbershoot: Seattle's Music & Arts Festival, Treefort Music Fest and lots of places that aren't festivals. Comedy Clubs. Colleges. Bars. Elks Lodges. He was the winner of the 2013 Northwest Comedy Competition and a Semi-Finalist in the Seattle International Comedy Competition. Scott can be seen on the latest season of Laughs TV on FOX.

programme.title: Jenna Kim Jones
programme.desc: Jenna Kim Jones is a comedian known for her strong personality and little to no upper body strength. She recently came to grips with the fact that she will never be able to do a pull up and earn her 4th grade Presidential Fitness Award though she plans to exploit this limitation into a book or reality television deal. Jenna was born in Seoul, Korea and lived there for approximately 8 years until she moved to Provo, Utah. At 18, Jenna left Provo to attend New York University where she majored in Producing and Writing for Television. During her time at NYU, she interned at Follow Productions, The Martha Show, The Late Show with David Letterman, The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and CBS Primetime Casting. After graduating from NYU, Jenna began performing stand up comedy while she worked at The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. After working at The Daily Show for almost 4 years, Jenna met her husband Allan Moss and the two were married in July of 2012 at which point Jenna left New York City to move to Los Angeles, California to pursue comedy (and sunshine). When she isn't working on her Netflix addiction, Jenna spends her days and nights writing and telling jokes all over the country. Once upon a time, Huffington Post named Jenna One of 18 Funny Women You Should Be Following On Twitter. For those of you who don't know, that is a compliment. However, it's when she gets her name on a Buzzfeed list that she'll know she's really made it. Jenna has appeared on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart and performed stand up alongside some of the best comedians including Jim Gaffigan, John Oliver, Wyatt Cenac and Aasif Mandvi. Her podcast, #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones, is one of the Top 200 Comedy Podcasts on iTunes. Her first stand up comedy special also #SorryNotSorry with Jenna Kim Jones is available for sale at www.jennakimjones.com/shop. JKJ released a 2nd Comedy Special, “Jenna Kim Jones Live In Hollywood” as part of the “Everyone Laughs” series on Sirius XM Laugh USA in September of 2016. Her comedy plays regularly on both Sirius XM channels Laugh USA and Jeff and Larry's Comedy Roundup. Jenna is also known for her work as the on camera host/narrator of the feature length documentary, “Meet The Mormons” which was released in theaters nationwide on October 10, 2014 and is, as of now, the 31st most successful documentary of all time.

programme.title: Will Marfori
programme.desc: Will Marfori has appeared on the Late, Late Show with Craig Ferguson and is a regular on Sirius/XM Satellite radio. Performing at comedy clubs, colleges, and cruise ships, Will tours almost 50 weeks a year all around the world. Born with Cerebral Palsy, Will never felt like he fit in until he walked on stage for the first time in 1999. He started doing comedy in Norfolk, Virginia while attending Old Dominion University. He entered a stand-up comedy contest for the student body and won. He was hooked. Poking fun at his situation was empowering and it felt good to share his comedy with other people. In 2001 Will graduated from ODU and got a job working as a house MC at the Comedy Zone in Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Karen Rontowski
programme.desc: Karen Rontowski's fast-paced, quirky and charmingly optimistic comedy has been featured in clubs, TV, radio, and at corporate events all around the world. Her stand- up showcases endearing, self-effacing and intelligent characters that catch you by surprise every time. Karen uniquely blends comedy with her experience as a Paranormal Investigator and Reiki master. From fun with her family to her travels all over this great country Karen has fun where ever she goes. Her lighthearted confusion entertains kids of all ages. She is fascinated with the “afterlife” is convinced she will someday have a near death experience because, “I never finish anything.” She explains, “Sometimes a ghost will just do the same thing over and over in life. That's why I want to move into a house that is haunted by a maid." Karen's comedy is now featured in the new line of greeting cards called “Frank and Funny” sold at Target stores everywhere and is the comedy writer for “Haunted Magazine.” She is a regular on the Bob and Tom Radio Show and is a featured performer on their CD. Karen has appeared on The Late Show with David Letterman, Sirius Satellite Radio, Comics Unleashed, Comedy.com, Live at Gotham and Comedy Central. She has opened for show biz legends including Bob Hope, Ray Charles, David Brenner and the Monkees.

programme.title: John Wesley Austin: Straight Shooter
programme.desc: John Wesley Austin has been working the comedy club circuit for over 18 years, & it shows in his side-splitting and sometimes-outrageous stand-up comedy.

programme.title: Brad Upton
programme.desc: Brad Upton first stepped on stage in September of 1984 and he's never looked back. This ex-grade school teacher is now in his 30th year of comedy and is nearing 6000 lifetime performances. He is a past winner of the Las Vegas Comedy Festival and appeared recently at Caesar's Palace as part of the HBO Comedy Festival. He has spent the last eight years as the opening act for the legendary Johnny Mathis and did multiple shows all over the country with the late, great Joan Rivers. He has also been seen in concert with The Smothers Brothers, Smokey Robinson, Kenny Rogers, Dolly Parton, Lewis Black, George Jones, Glen Campbell, Pam Tillis and many others. Coast to coast all over North America isn't the only place Brad performs. In 2014 Brad headlined in Singapore, Hong Kong, The MGM in Macau and did eight nights in Israel as part of the Comedy for Koby benefit. His new CD entitled, "Brad Uptonogood" is heard regularly on Sirius Satellite Radio and is available online wherever music is sold. He also just released his first DVD entitled, "Brad Upton, Live from the 509".

programme.title: Andy Beningo
programme.desc: Over the past decade, Andy Beningo has established himself as one of the hardest working comedians in the business. Performing his clever, "every man" material has led to some 2,700 career performances. Along the way, he has appeared on AXS Gotham Comedy Live, as a final four finalist on CMT's Next Big Comic, and on the Bob and Tom radio show. Beningo's new CD regularly plays on Laugh USA on XM Sirius Radio. He's been hailed for his clean comedy, and was named one of the 40 Best Up and Coming Comedians in the country. He was also named "Best Comedian" by both the Detroit Metro Times and Detroit Hour magazine.

programme.title: Chris Strait: Laugh Till You Run Out of Air
programme.desc: If your type of comedian is someone who reminds us all how funny we all are, Chris Strait is for you! No funny topic is off-limits for this California native but he's just telling his story.

programme.title: Orlando Baxter
programme.desc: Orlando Baxter's fresh perspective and unique relatability makes this former high school teacher a fan favorite all over the world. In 2016, Orlando made his late night TV debut on the Conan show on TBS, and since then he's appeared on the television shows "Comedy Up Late" in Australia, B.E.T.'s "50 Central" and Laff Mobb's Laff Track on Tru TV.

programme.title: Jeff Dunham: Spark of Insanity
programme.desc: Jeff Dunham and his socially reckless suitcase posse are back in this highly anticipated follow-up to Jeff Dunham: Arguing with Myself.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger War Paint
programme.desc: Her innocent good looks are just a cover for Last Comic Standing winner Iliza Shlesinger's acerbic, stream-of-conscious comedy.

programme.title: Iliza Shlesinger: Freezing Hot
programme.desc: Smart and brazen comedian Iliza Shlesinger applies her fresh, laugh-out-loud perspective to the universal struggles between men and women.

programme.title: Todd Barry The Crowd Work Tour
programme.desc: Todd Barry went on a tour without the amazing jokes and did entire shows of riffing and bantering with the audience.

programme.title: David Cross Oh, Come On
programme.desc: Share the laughter, tears, & salty language that youve come to know and love. See what makes David Cross one of the top 400 comics in America today.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Bela Lugosi! An ugly robot! The power of invisibility! A military intelligence officer romancing an ambitious reporter! All of these exciting-sounding elements are undeniably contained within the runtime of The Phantom Creeps! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Every time the Blood Theatre has opened for business, someone has died. But this time, the most incompetent theater owner in town has a good feeling about his chances! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.sub-title: Shorts: Frustrating Fours and Fascinating Fives
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this educational child development film. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Frustrating Fours and Fascinating Fives!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 50's sci-fi classic! It's a tale of a man who transforms into a violent lizard creature whenever he is in the sun too long! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Hideous Sun Demon!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Lycan Colony takes everything you know about werewolves and asks “But what if it were dumber, cheaper, and the aspect ratio occasionally got all squished up for no apparent reason?” This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about the custodial arts. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for Color it Clean!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's horror classic about a satanic cult in a mysterious doll shop. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for The Devils Hand!

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg stars as a sassy lounge singer forced to hide from the mob in the last place anyone would ever look for her - a convent. Harvey Keitel and Kathy Najimy join a heavenly cast in this habit-forming comedy bursting with '60s Motown hits.

programme.title: The Proposal (2009)
programme.desc: When high-powered book editor faces deportation back to Canada, she declares that she's actually engaged to her put-upon assistant who she's tormented for years.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life in Julie & Julia, the true stories of how Julia Child's (Meryl Streep) life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell (Amy Adams) to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. Stanley Tucci (The Devil Wears Prada) co-stars in director Nora Ephron's delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appétit!

programme.title: I Can Only Imagine
programme.desc: The inspiring true story behind Christian band MercyMe's beloved, chart topping song that brings ultimate hope to so many with the power of true love and forgiveness.

programme.title: Life-Size 2: A Christmas Eve
programme.desc: Grace Manning is in over her head as CEO of Marathon Toys and her wild-child ways are causing the company's stock to plummet. Grace's old Eve doll magically awakes to help get Grace back on track.

programme.title: Christmas Song
programme.desc: When budget cuts force the merger of two New York City high schools, two music teachers aim to compete in the largest televised Christmas carol competition that will determine the fate of the school's music program and the teachers' jobs.

programme.title: Falling for Christmas
programme.desc: When champion figure skater Claire becomes injured she is sent to a rehabilitation center in the snowy mountains where she meets and falls for a local ice fisherman who shows her there is more to life than competition.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: A Christmas miracle gives rival meteorologists Tara and Sam the opportunity of a lifetime to move up to the big leagues. In order to reach their dream job interview, they first have to beat an impending blizzard to the city.

programme.title: Sappy Holiday
programme.desc: When a hardworking but uninspired sous chef accidentally discovers her boyfriend is going to propose to her on Christmas Eve, she begins doubting their future together especially when a handsome maple farmer rescues her from a snowstorm.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: The eccentric dad of three children dresses as a British nanny so he can care for his children at the home of their mother in this touching comedy.

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: Whoopi Goldberg stars as a sassy lounge singer forced to hide from the mob in the last place anyone would ever look for her - a convent. Harvey Keitel and Kathy Najimy join a heavenly cast in this habit-forming comedy bursting with '60s Motown hits.

programme.title: The Proposal (2009)
programme.desc: When high-powered book editor faces deportation back to Canada, she declares that she's actually engaged to her put-upon assistant who she's tormented for years.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A culinary legend provides a frustrated office worker with a new recipe for life in Julie & Julia, the true stories of how Julia Child's (Meryl Streep) life and cookbook inspired fledgling writer Julie Powell (Amy Adams) to whip up 524 recipes in 365 days and introduce a new generation to the magic of French cooking. Stanley Tucci (The Devil Wears Prada) co-stars in director Nora Ephron's delicious comedy about joy, obsession and butter. Bon appétit!

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: An epic set against the breathtaking landscapes of ancient China, Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon combines the exhilarating martial arts choreography by Yuen Wo-Ping (The Matrix) with the sensitivity and classical storytelling of an Ang Lee film. The result is something truly unexpected: romantic, emotionally powerful entertainment.

programme.title: Who Framed Roger Rabbit
programme.desc: When Toontown's owner is found murdered, all fingers point to cartoon superstar Roger Rabbit. With nowhere else to turn—and the sinister, power-hungry Judge Doom hot on his tail—Roger begs the Toon-hating detective Eddie Valiant to find the real evildoer. But the plot thickens as Eddie uncovers scandal after scandal and realizes the very existence of Toontown is at stake!

programme.title: National Security
programme.desc: When Martin Lawrence (Bad Boys) and Steve Zahn (Daddy Day Care) team up as security guards, no one's safe! LAPD reject and major troublemaker, Earl (Lawrence), got L.A. cop Hank (Zahn) kicked off the force for brutality. Now, these two guys, who can't stand each other, are stuck working together as lowly security guards. And they're playing cops to bring down a smuggling ring if they can stay alive and stay one step ahead of the real cops. Co-starring Eric Roberts (The Specialist), NATIONAL SECURITY will take you on a wild ride with the most unlikely heroes ever to wear a badge!

programme.title: Hellboy (2004)
programme.desc: From visionary writer/director Guillermo del Toro (director of Blade II, The Devil's Backbone) comes Hellboy, a supernatural action adventure based on Mike Mignola's popular Dark Horse Comics series of the same name. Born in the flames of hell and brought to Earth as an infant to perpetrate evil, Hellboy (Ron Perlman) was rescued from sinister forces by the benevolent Dr. Broom (John Hurt), who raised him to be a hero. In Dr. Broom's secret Bureau of Paranormal Research and Defense, Hellboy creates an unlikely family consisting of the telepathic "Mer-Man" Abe Sapien (Doug Jones) and Liz Sherman (Selma Blair), the woman he loves who can control fire. Hidden from the very society that they protect, they stand as the key line of defense against an evil madman who seeks to reclaim Hellboy to the dark side and use his powers to destroy mankind.

programme.title: Christmas Everlasting
programme.desc: Hallmark Hall of Fame. Lucy heads home to hear the terms of her sister's unusual will at Christmas.

programme.title: Merry Matrimony
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Brie has to work with her ex to organize the perfect Christmas photo shoot.

programme.title: Christmas Scavenger Hunt
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Belinda and her ex are forced to team up for the towns Christmas Scavenger Hunt.

programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Amber spends the holidays with her Aunt Dora and helps plan a Christmas Concert.

programme.title: Christmas Song
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. 2 music teachers compete in the largest televised Christmas carol competition.

programme.title: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: A Madison Avenue executive, Amy, discovers an unusual Christmas surprise.

programme.desc: The GREAT AMERICAN STORE accidentally orders 60,000 Christmas Lights.

programme.desc: During her first days working at a social media company.

programme.desc: Handsome but lonely mailman, Tom, has a crush on Lauren.

programme.title: The Holiday Fix Up
programme.desc: Sam returns to her hometown during the holidays to renovate the Bell Harbor Inn.

programme.title: Rambo
programme.desc: When a group of aid workers disappears, John Rambo accompanies a group of mercenaries on a rescue mission.

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: Rambo must confront his past and unearth his ruthless combat skills to exact revenge in a final mission.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger fights for survival against drug traffickers who have stashed heroin in his hunting cabin.

programme.title: Blood Father
programme.desc: An ex-convict fights to protect his estranged daughter from the drug cartel that is hunting her down.

programme.title: Coraline
programme.desc: Coraline Jones discovers a secret world that's like her own, but better! When her Other Mother tries to keep her, Coraline must be brave to get home.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather, Coda
programme.desc: Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The machine elite of the nuclear war-torn future has dispatched a cyborg into the past to kill a young boy.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Ex-pilot Cooper must leave his family and Earth behind to lead an expedition beyond this galaxy.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young couple move into their dream home and are harassed by their next-door neighbor, an LAPD officer.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol Agent and a Manhattan ADA try to bring to justice a powerful bank which is financing terrorism.

programme.title: Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: A family is stranded on an island in the "27th dimension" after a strange storm causes their boat to sink.

programme.title: A Raisin In The Sun (1961)
programme.desc: Conflicts of a struggling African-American family who suddenly come into a financial windfall.

programme.title: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: A daughter brings her fiance home to meet her parents, not having told them he s black.

programme.title: Shopworn
programme.desc: Stanwyck is a waitress engaged to Toomey though his mother opposes her son's marriage to Stanwyck.

programme.title: Disturbia
programme.desc: Living under three months' house arrest, Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf, Transformers) passes his days spying on the neighbors. It's all fun and games until things take a horrifying turn for the worse.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: World Trade Center
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage and Michael Pena star as two New York City Port Authority policemen who were trapped in the rubble of September 11, 2001.

channel.display-name: Movies on the Rotten Tomatoes Channel

programme.title: Dragonheart: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A young stable boy (Christopher Masterson) with dreams of being a knight discovers a baby dragon and tries to help him learn how to fly and fight.

programme.title: Problem Child
programme.desc: Ben (John Ritter) is a good-hearted guy who's always wanted a son of his own, but so far he and his wife have had no success. The couple adopt Junior (Michael Oliver), a redheaded hellion who quickly makes their lives miserable. Disaster follows Junior wherever he goes, from camping trips that require emergency-room visits to birthday parties that turn into Grand Guignol affairs. When Ben's incensed family tells him to get rid of the boy, he starts to wonder if they might be right.

programme.title: Problem Child 2
programme.desc: Ben Healy (John Ritter) and his adopted son, the mischievous and destructive Junior (Michael Oliver), move to a new town for a fresh start in what happens to be "the divorcée capital of the world." Now the two face a multitude of women throwing themselves at Ben, though a new mom isn't what Junior wants. But Junior has more to worry about than his father's dates -- the little troublemaker might have met his match in Trixie Young (Ivyann Schwan), a small girl with a big chip on her shoulder.

programme.title: Problem Child 3: Junior in Love
programme.desc: First love for unruly preteen Junior (Justin Chapman) means aggravation for dad (William Katt), grandpa (Jack Warden) and others.

programme.title: It's a Very Merry Muppet Christmas Movie
programme.desc: Kermit tries to save the theater from a banker (Joan Cusack) who wants to demolish it and open a trendy nightclub.

programme.title: The Christmas Dance
programme.desc: After having a traumatizing holiday history, Sarah learns to love Christmas again.

programme.title: Holiday Breakup
programme.desc: A couple falls crazy in love, only to break up right before all the big holiday parties. It's Suckville, so they pretend to still be mad for each other instead of mad at each other. It's the perfect plan-if they don't fall back in love.

programme.title: 12 Days of Christmas
programme.desc: During their first winter break from college, two childhood friends navigate turbulent reunions, unspoken romances, and even an unplanned pregnancy.

programme.title: Santa Girl
programme.desc: Santa Claus� only daughter wants to experience the �real world� before she must marry the son of Jack Frost and take over the family business. Cassie Claus sets off to college while trying to keep her famous father a secret.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Magic in Mount Holly
programme.desc: A new gallery owner discovers that she can paint the future using a paintbrush left by Santa. As she discovers the true magic within herself, she also learns to love and be more confident.

programme.title: Christmas in Scotland
programme.desc: On vacation in Scotland, an installation designer enters a festive contest with a local heir.

programme.title: Christmas By Candlelight
programme.desc: Wellness expert, Juliet, works on Christmas memory candles with boutique store owner Tom.

programme.title: Too Cool for Christmas
programme.desc: Lindsay thinks she is too cool to be with her family on Christmas. When she ends up delivering presents with Santa himself, she finds out what Christmas really means.

programme.title: She's On Duty
programme.desc: For catching a gangster, a cop, Jae-in, poses as a high school girl to get close to the gangster's daughter.

programme.title: A Case Of Bachelor Abduction
programme.desc: Three friends investigate a mysterious woman who abducted and shamed two of them, using various tactics.

programme.title: The Intimate
programme.desc: A bride-to-be accepts an invitation from a stranger to be his woman for a day, thinking it is her last fling.

programme.title: Miss Butcher
programme.desc: A man is brutally murdered. Gu-ho, the detective in charge, suspects Soon-ae, who runs a butcher's shop.

programme.title: Melted Lipstick
programme.desc: Riley Davis, a young woman in her twenties, who navigates through life fraught with insecurities about her body, self-esteem issues. Her life takes a mystical turn when she encounters an enigmatic voodoo doctor who gifts her a special lipstick, claiming that it holds the power to transform her into anyone she desires when applied. However, Riley soon learn that all magic comes for a price, as she goes down a dangerous and deadly path of destruction.

programme.title: Mr. Hit Me Up
programme.desc: Lifelong best friends, two men seemingly beat the trauma of their childhood. However, one holds in a fatal secret he can no longer suppress. A podcast would challenge that love and expose the deepest of secrets of the other as he unintentionally falls in love with his best friend's girlfriend in this spiraled drama. Who does he choose?

programme.title: Missing You This Christmas TV-14
programme.desc: Carmen's family has an annual Christmas tradition that supports her neighborhood. When her mother dies suddenly, she looses the holiday spirit, and no longer wants to continue, until she's visited by her late father's spirit who encourages her to keep hope alive.

programme.title: Twerk: Reggae Nights
programme.desc: Hard-working, single mother, Iesha, learns that one of the most popular reggae artists, Domino, is holding an audition in her city for dancers in his next music video. The competition is fierce, and some of the ladies will do anything to get the job.

programme.title: NEW KPOP
programme.desc: Experience the true charm of winter with the "Essential Winter Soundtrack". From the first snowfall to the warm atmosphere of the holiday season, this playlist captures the emotions and afterglow that winter brings. programme.title: Astrud Gilberto, Marcelo Gilberto, David Sacks & Gil Goldstein
programme.sub-title: Astrud Gilberto Band Live at Estival Lugano 1985
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. “The Girl From Ipanema”, Astrud Gilberto's second name. The Brazilian bossa-nova and samba singer gives an outstanding, swinging performance at Estival Lugano. The band features Marcello Gilberto, David Sacks, Gil Goldstein, and Eduardo da Fonseca. Astrud started to record her own compositions in the '70s. She has recorded songs in Portuguese, English, Spanish, Italian, French, German, and Japanese.

programme.title: Christian Scott
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Kenny G
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, smooth jazz saxophonist and crowd-favorite Kenny G serenaded those attending the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. After beginning his career in the Love Unlimited Orchestra, he now brings his own band for this hypnotic performance.

programme.title: Louis Armstrong
programme.desc: Following a highly successful small-group jazz concert at New York Town Hall on May 17, 1947, Armstrong's manager Joe Glaser dissolved the Armstrong big band on August 13, 1947 and established a six-piece small group. This group was called the All Stars, and in 1964 Louis Armstrong recorded his biggest-selling record, Hello, Dolly! He made assorted television appearances, especially in the 1950s and 1960s – the recorded film was a TV Show in Australia when Armstrong was at the peak of his career. Armstrong kept up his busy tour schedule until a few years before his death in 1971. He also toured Africa, Europe, and Asia under sponsorship of the US State Department with great success, earning the nickname ‘Ambassador Satch'.

programme.title: Walter Trout, Johnny Griparic, Teddy Andreadis "Zig Zag" & Michael Leasure
programme.desc: Every year since 1970, the German city of Burghausen has been hosting one of the largest jazz festivals in the world. During Burghausen International Jazz Week, Burghausen becomes a 'Bavarian jazz mecca': guests from all over the world join the Burghausers to enjoy the most wonderful jazz performances as the colorful hustle and bustle of spectators and musicians shake up the city. One of the bands performing here in 2019 is the Walter Trout Band. Trout, who was born in New Jersey and is based in Los Angeles, is a world-famous contemporary blues rock guitarist and vocalist.

programme.title: Avishai Cohen
programme.desc: Stingray DJAZZ

programme.title: Anita Oday, Göran Engdahl, Roman Dylag & John Poole
programme.desc: Anita O'Day boasts two wonderful concerts from 1963 and 1970 that present the “jazz singer supreme” in impeccable form. O'Day's horn-based approach to singing is in full effect throughout both shows including stand-out renditions in each show of audience favorites “Tea For Two” and “Sweet Georgia Brown” (both reprised from her triumphant appearance at the 1958 Newport Jazz Festival.) This show is a fitting testimony to one of jazz music's true originals and shows unequivocally why she is ranked in the top tier of vocalists along with Ella Fitzgerald, Sarah Vaughan, and Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Lalah Hathaway
programme.desc: Winner of five Grammys in four consecutive years, including the Grammy for best R&B album in 2017, Lalah Hathaway is a force impossible to ignore. The American artist has shared the scene with Prince, Snoop Dogg, Stevie Wonder, Anita Baker, Mary J. Blige, Frank Ocean and many others, an irrefutable proof of her keen musical sense and enormous talent. With a 26-year career, Hathaway is still highly sought after by the biggest names in music. See her transform the 2018 Sing Jazz festival scene into a real R&B club, where she flaunts her voice and stage presence out of the ordinary.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Foo Fighters
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Leon Bridges
programme.desc: The Apple Music Festival (formerly known as the iTunes Festival) was a music concert series held by Apple, Inc. inaugurated in 2007.

programme.title: Various Artists
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts

programme.title: Whitney Houston
programme.desc: Whitney Houston was one of the best-selling music artists, with 200 million records sold worldwide, and the only artist to chart seven consecutive No. 1 Billboard Hot 100 songs. Houston's crossover appeal on the popular music charts, as well as her prominence on MTV, starting with her video for How Will I Know", Whitney Houston influenced several African American women artists who follow in her footsteps. "I Will Always Love You)", which received the Grammy Award for Record of the Year and became the best-selling singles by a woman in music history. With a history of drug addiction and tumultuous relationships, Houston was to tragically die in her room at The Beverly Hilton on February 11, 2012, The official coroner's report showed that she had accidentally drowned in the bathtub, with heart disease and cocaine use listed as contributing factors.

programme.title: John Denver
programme.desc: John Denver, began his music career with folk music groups during the late 1960s. Starting in the 1970s, he was one of the most popular acoustic artists of the decade and one of its best-selling artists. By 1974, he was firmly established as one of America's best-selling performers, often described as "among the most beloved entertainers of his era. Recording and releasing approximately 300 songs, with total sales of over 33 million records worldwide with his lyrics reflecting his joy in nature and disdain for city life, his enthusiasm for music, and his relationship trials. Denver, who was an avid pilot, died at the age of 53 flying his personal Canard aircraft in a single-fatality crash.

programme.title: Paul Simon
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall. The show presents this iconic artist working at the peak of his artistic and creative powers in an unusually intimate setting. The 20-song, 90-minute set list was drawn from his legendary career and includes several songs that haven't been performed live in many years. "Kodachrome," "Mother and Child Reunion," "Gone At Last" and "The Obvious Child" are just some of the highlights as well as songs from Simon's most recent album, 2011's So Beautiful or So What (Hear Music/Concord Music Group) including "Dazzling Blue," "Rewrite," "The Afterlife" and the album's propulsive title track.

programme.title: amarcordplus & Sebastian Heindl
programme.sub-title: Baroque choral music by Bach, Schütz et al.
programme.desc: Five-strong vocal ensemble amarcord is joined by an extra alto and two soprano voices for this unusual concert at Leipzig's St. Thomas Church. As amarcordplus, the ensemble presents a program focused on the city of Leipzig, which includes sacred madrigals by Johann Hermann Schein, motets from Heinrich Schütz's collection Geistliche Chor-Music, as well as two motets by the most famous Thomaskantor: Johann Sebastian Bach. Moreover, various sacred works by lesser-known contemporaries Philipp Heinrich Erlebach and mononymous composer Liebhold are performed, in addition to compositions by other members of the Bach family, including Johann Michael Bach and Johann Christoph Bach. This performance was recorded on May 1, 2020.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Russian conductor and pianist Mikhail Pletnev leads the Russian National Orchestra in performances of Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov's music. On the program are Suite for Orchestra after the opera 'The Legend of the Invisible City of Kitezh and the Maiden Fevroniya', and Musical Pictures for Orchestra from the opera 'The Tale of Tsar Saltan'. Part of the latter is the famous 'Flight of the Bumblebee'. This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall of the Russian Philharmonic Society in 2017.

programme.title: Nikolay Lugansky
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester, Andris Nelsons & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: In May 2019, the new principal conductor of the Gewandhaus, Andris Nelsons, presented Tchaikovsky's Symphony No. 5 with his orchestra in combination with Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1 with outstanding violinist Baiba Skride as the soloist. In this composition, the violin does not allow itself a break, continually tells its dark story and gets into a vicious circle of ostinato Passacaglia bass lines again and again falls into beguilingly beautiful singing. Tchaikovsky initially thought his 'Symphony of Fate' was a failure and believed himself to be at the end of his creative powers. It was probably the composer's nature, plagued by self-doubt, that made it almost impossible for him to develop a self-confident attitude to his own creative power. Between this two works, Skride performs Stravinsky's Elegy for Solo Violin.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Luego de separarse tras el tiroteo, Aurelio y Ximena se reúnen con sus hijos. El Turco usa a Irina para averiguar el paradero de Casillas, y así poder negociar con él.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Matilde quiere aliarse con Chema para hacer un negocio a espaldas de Chacorta. Lay se mete a la tina con Aurelio y, luego de algunas confesiones, pasan una noche de pasión.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Aurelio visita a Mónica para amenazarla, pero ella recuerda el daño que él le hizo y se defiende. Más tarde, los hombres de Leonor se enfrentan a Chacorta y a Heriberto en una emboscada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: En venganza por la paliza de Max, Lucas sigue a su madre hasta la tumba del Tigre. Allí le lanza una piedra a la cabeza, dejando a Francisca en estado grave. Lucho e Irene hacen el amor.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro tiene una foto de Lucho, se la muestra a su hija y ella dice que es el duende. Francisca tiene un mensaje del Tigre para Verónica, le pide que ataque a sus enemigos y los sorprenda.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Paula amenaza a Sofía con matar a su hija y así logra que ella confiese el asesinato de Irene y devuelva el disco con las pruebas que incriminan a Ernesto. Joel sospecha que es una farsa.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: La fiesta de cumpleaños de Charlie es un evento al que Eliza lleva pasteles y ve a Max después de 10 años. Sofía es víctima de un fatal accidente, justo cuando le iban a cambiar la sentencia.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: Todos la dan por muerta, pero Sofía rescata niñas de la trata y Joel la encuentra. Eliza descubre todo sobre Max y él, sin justificación, por bígamo, dice que es la única a quien ha querido.

programme.title: Silvana sin lana: Chivis se quiere divorciar
programme.desc: Chivis le comunica a su familia que se va a divorciar, María José le dice que la perderá para siempre, pero Angie la apoya. Decidida, Chivis se quita su anillo de bodas. Majo vuelve con Andrés.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Guillermo compra la deuda de Flavia, su venganza sigue en pie, asegura que la dejará en la calle. Bianca se disculpa frente a los Piamonte y accede a que Bruno regrese a la casa.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: Flavia admite que está en la ruina, Ariel se entera de la situación de su suegra, pero Bianca no quiere que la ayude. Flavia, contra la pared, va a firmar los papeles para entregar su casa.

programme.title: Pasión prohibida
programme.desc: La noche romántica de Bianca y Ariel queda opacada por el grave accidente de Flavia, que se embriaga y al salir de un bar choca su auto contra un árbol. Nina descubre algo que la sorprende.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Armando y Marlene conspiran: él planea sacarla del juego y ella busca hacer lo mismo, mientras los Palacios ponen en práctica su perversa estrategia para que Soler no le quite los clientes.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Marlene le dice a Betty que Pablo sigue con Eva y que le van a quitar a su hija. Ella se altera y cae al piso. Palacios no la ayuda y escapa al creerla muerta. Eva y Pablo al fin se ponen de acuerdo.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Betty está entre la vida y la muerte. La doctora le informa a Pablo que está delicada de salud y tienen que practicarle una cesárea de emergencia, pero ella se niega. Adriana se siente traicionada.

programme.title: Eva la Trailera
programme.desc: Betty le dice a Pablo que solo se someterá a una cesárea si se casa con ella. Él se siente perdido y busca el consejo de quienes le rodean, busca a Eva en su casa y le pide que vaya al hospital.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Fatmagül enfrenta a Mukaddes y Rahmi escucha la discución. Mukaddes le cuenta toda la verdad a Rahmi. Mustafá está muy delicado en el hospital. Erdogan y Munir se enfrentan.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Vural previene a Kerim. Los padres de Mustafá se oponen a su relación con Asu Des. Fatmagül está molesta con Kerim. A Mustafá le dan una alternativa para salvar a Asu.

programme.title: ¿Qué Culpa Tiene Fatmagül?
programme.desc: Fatmagül enfrenta a Kerim y le dice que lo vió hablando con Vural. Vural ya no puede más con la culpa. Kerim siente que lo ha perdido todo. Mustafá queda en deuda con Erdogan.

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: In the season 3 finale of Food is Love, Chef Lasse Sorensen looks back at a year of new friends, inspiring stories and incredible experiences. From honored family traditions to new age food innovations everyone has a different story to tell but in the end they all demonstrate how food really is love. (S3 E13)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: In episode 10 of Food is Love, Chef Lasse nostalgically searches St. Louis for a connection to his upbringing in his fathers renown pastry shop. Highlights include stops at Vincent Van Doughnuts in Tower Grove, Kaldi Coffee Roasters and making macrons at La Patisserie Choquette in Botanical Heights. (S1 E10)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: In episode 111 Chef Lasse spends time getting to know James Beard nominated restauranteur Chef Ben Poremba and the food in his restaurants Olio, Elaia, and Nixta. Along the way they discover a connection to Lasse past in Hollywood. (S1 E11)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: Chef Lasse explores the food of Uruguay and Ecuador at the Maplewood restaurant Asador Del Sur. Later, a classic rivalry influences Lasse to defend Denmark's reputation on the soccer field. (S1 E12)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: Chef Lasse Sorensen spends the day with Chef Logan Ely of the restaurant The Lucky Accomplice. where he learns how training in Ju jitsu helps with being well disciplined in the restaurant. Highlights include eating cake without cutting it and Lasse separating several ribs while learning Ju Jitsu. (S2 E09)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: From the field to the table, Chef Lasse Sorensen meets the families who keep the American Steakhouse tradition alive. From raising healthy Cattle to knowing the way to prepare a perfect steak. Featuring Meyer Cattle farms and Citizen Kane's Steakhouse in Kirkwood. (S2 E10)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: On a mission to try some of the foods that got their start in St. Louis, Chef Lasse solicits the help of food vlogger @BradenSTL who takes him on a tour of some of the quintessential St. Louis originals including toasted ravioli, St. Louis style pizza and gooey butter cake to name a few. (S3 E04)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: Because of its history as a brewing hub, St. Louis also has always been home to a lot pubs and bars. Chef Lasse explore the food and stories at a few of St. Louis most iconic bars in search of something to eat. (S3 E10)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen
programme.desc: Chef Lasse Sorensen takes a tour of some of the places that make Cherokee Street so eclectic and along the way finds connections to his home in Southern Illinois. Highlights include, The whiskey ring, B-sides, Yaqui On Cherokee and the Golden Record. (S3 E11)

programme.title: Food is Love with Chef Lasse Sorensen

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati spends a day in Sonora's capital, Hermosillo, visiting some of the city's best culinary destinations. From gigantic burritos at Doña Guille, to a meat lover's feast with the owner of the popular restaurant Mochomos, mingling with the young crowd at La Ruina brew park, and a treat no trip would be complete without, Sonoran hot dogs, Pati experiences all Hermosillo's food scene has to offer. (S9 E02)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati experiences two important Sonoran culinary traditions. First, on the coast in Bahía Kino, local fishermen receive “the blessing” from a woman from the Seri tribe before heading out on the water to catch giant sea scallops. Then, in the mountain town of Matape, Nere, one of Sonora's few female butchers, shares with Pati a tradition called “the benefit” and how she helps feed the community. (S9 E03)

programme.title: Patis Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati learns that carne asada goes way beyond grilled meat in Sonora. It's an important weekly ritual that brings the whole family together. Back home, Pati throws a carne asada in her backyard for her husband and boys. First, she teaches them the basics of a true Sonoran carne asada. Then, for dessert, a whipped peanut buttercream and grape galette. (S9 E04)

programme.title: M.I.A. & D.E.A
programme.desc: When Matt and Froy go missing, Sonia is on a mission to figure out what they've got up their sleeves.

programme.title: Going Green and Falling Down
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy arrive on the scene to a repo a car that's been refitted to run on biodiesel and are shocked to see that its owner shares some of Sonia's features.

programme.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones
programme.desc: First, Froy, Lou, and Matt wrestle a group of body builders when going after a Jeep Commander. Next, an unemployed stock broker gets a rude awakening when Lou and Lyndah wake him up inside his car. And finally, Froy learns why you should never text and not drive to pick up Sonia, because she breaks his phone in two.

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer. Then, on a journey for a Journey, Lou and Froy battle with a bowler. And finally, Froy and Lyndah deal with a back peddling super-sized owner of a Nissan Altima.

programme.title: The Junior Partner
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: The Showstopper
programme.desc: While attempting a repo of a "green energy" bio-diesel vehicle, Froy's (Froylan Tercero) lack of knowledge of the vehicle's specialized fuel system sets the bus ablaze... and when his error causes it to explode, he and Matt (Matt Burch) abandon builders/owners Mickie (Michael Q. Schmidt) and Joey (Gino Calabro) in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Coffee-slinging Waitress
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors? And finally, Lyndah and Sonia wind up getting burned on a repo, literally, when a coffee-wielding waitress goes buck-wild.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Everybody Just a Child?
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get the worst service ever from a street-side coffee vendor who won't give up his truck. Then, Froy and Lyndah confront a failed actor who has abandoned his dream and his responsibility for his car payments. Finally, it's death from above when Lou, Sonia and Matt try to repossess a vintage Caddy from a model plane enthusiast and his eccentric son.

programme.title: Hard Turns Ahead
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business, Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team, or the beginning of its undoing?

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: Interview with the Repo Man
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Froy out to repo from a pizza delivery man way behind on his payments. Then, Matt and Froy deal with an unhelpful citizen when they have to repossess from a cop. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, and Matt deal with another repossessor when trying to repo a repo truck, until Lou can get on scene and offer the debtor a deal.

programme.title: The Kardashians: Reality Royalty
programme.desc: The Kardashian family rose to success in 2007 and they are still in the spotlight over a decade later, appealing to an audience of all ages. They have filmed their lives day in and day out, sharing everything from proposals to childbirth, through tears and laughter. With millions of selfies among them and a wide variety of product endorsements, the Kardashians are winning awards and breaking the Internet. They are the royal family of reality TV. Directed by Danielle Winter.

programme.title: Britney Spears: Unbreakable
programme.desc: Look into the glamorous and tumultuous life of pop sensation Britney Spears. From her incredible skyrocketing ascent into stardom to her personal troubles and downfalls, see the inside of the star's life with exclusive interviews. Directed by Sonia Anderson.

programme.title: Adele: Homecoming
programme.desc: Adele is a Grammy Award-winning artist whose soulful sound has thrust her into the limelight. Her soulful voice, frank personality and chart-topping hits have made her one of the most successful artists of all time. Her authenticity in her work appeals to so many there are no gimmicks with Adele. What you see is what you get. Through her own words, video and live performances, this documentary takes an incredible look at the life and times of one of the greatest artists of all time. Directed by Billy Simpson.

programme.title: Bruce Willis: All American Hero
programme.desc: Bruce Willis is one of the all-time greats. For the Hollywood action hero with an incredible body of workout was his portrayal of police officer John McClane in Die Hard that catapulted Bruce Willis to stardom. The action-packed flick hit movie screens across the country with a bang, later spawned four sequels, and established him as one of Hollywood's leading action hero. Bruce Willis has remained one of the most well-known actors of his generation. Known for his charm and humor, through career highs and lows Willis enjoyed much fame. With over a hundred films to his credit and many successful ones to boot, Bruce Willis is certainly an actor who has amassed a widespread fan following throughout his career. Willis showed no signs of slowing down, until a tragic announcement in 2022. Directed by Roxane Schlumberger.

programme.title: From Russia With Lev
programme.desc: From Executive Producer Rachel Maddow and Director Billy Corben, "From Russia With Lev" reveals the outrageous scheme that led to former President Donald Trump's first impeachment. It follows the much, much larger-than-life journey of Lev Parnas, a Ukrainian-born hustler and former small-time mafia operator whose random, almost accidental association with Trump and Trump attorney Rudolph Giuliani took him around the world, and ultimately to prison. Lev reveals the ham-handed workings of the furtive campaign to dredge up false but damaging allegations against then-candidate Joe Biden. Directed by Billy Corben.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Fans previously witnessed the rise of The Beast as the new WOW World Champion. The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard plots to get the championship belt back by partnering with The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. But did Tessa read the fine print in her contract? Action and chaos in the WOW Tag Team Division continues. And The Fabulous Lana Star stoops to a new level of in-ring-disrespect as she aims to secure victory through her prodigy, The Lioness at all costs. The shocking Main Event will determine who secures a championship title match against The Biggest, The Baddest, The WOW World Champion….The Beast!

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Tonight has “feud” written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star's past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Tessa Blanchard's shocking disqualification from last week's battle with Venomous costs her much desired championship rematch against The Beast. The Dixie Darlings make a peace offering to Jessie Jones. And Stephy Slays bravely takes up for her friend against The Temptress and The Dagger who attacked Keta Rush in the alley.

ABOUT THE COLOR BLUE: The color blue has a cooling, and soothing effect upon the nervous system, and upon the bloody and bodily organs. "Turquoise is cerebrally calming, and is an effective color for sound sleep. Blue stimulates intuitive powers and is a vitality builder, and is also said to help activate the pineal gland as it is the color of the spirit." -From the book Color Medicine by C. Klotsche*
